name: export_results
description: Export structured data (list of dicts or rows) to a file in CSV, JSON, or plain-text format. Saves to the data directory and returns the relative file path. Use after analysis to persist results for the user or subsequent agents.

data.description: Data to export. For CSV: list of dicts (keys become headers) or list of lists. For JSON: any JSON-serialisable structure. For text: a string.

filename.description: Output filename (e.g. 'results.csv'). Extension auto-added if missing.

headers.description: Column headers for CSV when data is a list of lists. Ignored for list-of-dicts (headers taken from keys).

file_path.description: Relative path of the saved file within the data directory.

row_count.description: Number of rows written (for CSV/JSON arrays) or 0 for other types.
